narrative.description: Bowser's Koopalings have transformed the Mushroom World's kings into animals. Mario and Luigi traverse eight themed kingdoms on an overworld map, enter action stages and fortresses, and use power-ups to reach each Koopaling and ultimately Bowser.
narrative.core_loop: Navigate the overworld map to pick stages, run and jump through side-scrolling levels collecting power-ups and coins, defeat fortress bosses and Koopalings to restore kings, and advance toward Bowser's castle.

mechanics.map_notes: Eight kingdom overworlds with branching paths, locked areas, and player-chosen stage order.
mechanics.expression: Eight kingdom overworlds with branching paths, locked areas, and player-chosen stage order.

mechanics.map_notes: Super Mushroom, Fire Flower, Super Leaf, Tanooki Suit, Frog Suit, and Hammer Suit each change abilities and appearance.
mechanics.expression: Super Mushroom, Fire Flower, Super Leaf, Tanooki Suit, Frog Suit, and Hammer Suit each change abilities and appearance.

mechanics.map_notes: Snappy Mario physics with variable jump height and no momentum carry.
mechanics.expression: Snappy Mario physics with variable jump height and no momentum carry.

mechanics.map_notes: Airship fortresses and Koopalings gate kingdom completion and king restoration.
mechanics.expression: Airship fortresses and Koopalings gate kingdom completion and king restoration.

mechanics.map_notes: Small Mario dies in one hit; powered-up forms absorb an extra hit before shrinking.
mechanics.expression: Small Mario dies in one hit; powered-up forms absorb an extra hit before shrinking.

mechanics.map_notes: Pits, lava, spikes, and autoscroll sections test traversal skill.
mechanics.expression: Pits, lava, spikes, and autoscroll sections test traversal skill.

mechanics.map_notes: Fire Flower grants immediate fireball projectiles on button press.
mechanics.expression: Fire Flower grants immediate fireball projectiles on button press.

mechanics.map_notes: Releasing jump early produces shorter hops for tight platforming.
mechanics.expression: Releasing jump early produces shorter hops for tight platforming.

mechanics.map_notes: Lives counter decrements on death; game over when lives reach zero.
mechanics.expression: Lives counter decrements on death; game over when lives reach zero.

mechanics.map_notes: Coins and 1-Up mushrooms scattered in levels and on the overworld map.
mechanics.expression: Coins and 1-Up mushrooms scattered in levels and on the overworld map.

mechanics.map_notes: Fortress mid-bosses and certain stage markers act as progress anchors.
mechanics.expression: Fortress mid-bosses and certain stage markers act as progress anchors.

mechanics.map_notes: Bowser and several Koopalings shift attack patterns across phases.
mechanics.expression: Bowser and several Koopalings shift attack patterns across phases.

mechanics.map_notes: Hidden white blocks, secret exits, and warp whistles reward thorough exploration.
mechanics.expression: Hidden white blocks, secret exits, and warp whistles reward thorough exploration.

mechanics.map_notes: Koopalings and Boom Boom follow learnable attack and movement cycles.
mechanics.expression: Koopalings and Boom Boom follow learnable attack and movement cycles.

mechanics.map_notes: Toad Houses and spade panels offer power-ups and bonus minigames for coins.
mechanics.expression: Toad Houses and spade panels offer power-ups and bonus minigames for coins.

mechanics.map_notes: Thwomps, Boo circles, and boss wind-ups telegraph before striking.
mechanics.expression: Thwomps, Boo circles, and boss wind-ups telegraph before striking.

mechanics.map_notes: Fireballs from Fire Flower state have no ammo limit.
mechanics.expression: Fireballs from Fire Flower state have no ammo limit.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Super Mario Bros. 3 through its core platformer loop.
